code: import{combineReducers}from'redux';import{reducer as formReducer}from"redux-form";import authReducer from'./authReducer';import bugReducer from'./bugReducer';import userReducer from'./userReducer';import commentReducer from'./commentReducer';import projectReducer from'./projectReducer';export default combineReducers({auth:authReducer,form:formReducer,bug:bugReducer,user:userReducer,comm:commentReducer,proj:projectReducer});
